name: Beef-Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions, meat (ground round or extra lean), and garlic in a Teflon skillet.
2. Stir in the oregano.
3. Add undiluted soup and tomatoes.
4. Mix well until combined.
5. Yield: 10 servings
6. Nutritional Info/ Serving:
- Calories: 230
- Fat: 5 grams
Notes:
Recipe from DIABETES911 at http://www.Diabetes911.com/recipes.htm
